confidence_rationale: This is clearly instructional/educational content, not a performance evaluation. The video contains narrated text overlays ('Tip: Blow into the glove', 'Step 3:', 'Time to Operate'), product branding (Inovus Products), and educational sequencing showing setup, anatomy, and operative technique demonstration. It is not a timed performance by a trainee.
cannot_determine: This is instructional content, not a scorable performance video

demonstrated_techniques: Proper foam hand model preparation and inflation
Anatomical marking and incision planning using dashed lines
Laparoscopic instrument positioning for loop deployment
Loop advancement around foam appendage target
Loop cinching and tightening at marked surgical line
Appendage securing with pre-tied ligating loop
verbal_cues: Tip: Blow into the glove — preparing foam model
Time to Operate — transition to operative phase
common_errors_addressed: Proper model inflation ensures realistic tissue handling
Clear marking of incision sites prevents placement errors
Careful instrument approach avoids damaging target appendage
Positioning loop at marked line ensures accurate placement

video_type_explanation: This is an Inovus Productions educational/instructional video demonstrating the Endoloop task setup and basic operative technique. It is not a performance recording and should not be scored. The content includes equipment demonstration, model preparation instructions, anatomical teaching, and a demonstration of proper endoloop deployment technique.
